task_params.title: Q2 Hiring Cycle Lessons Memo
content_points: strongest candidates moved fastest through interview scheduling
panel feedback was uneven across hiring teams
scorecard completion lagged after final rounds
candidate drop-off increased when take-home reviews took over a week
recruiter and hiring manager kickoff alignment improved close rates

attributes.title: Q2 Hiring Funnel Review
attributes.content_brief: Quarterly review of applicant volume, stage conversion, time-to-fill, and offer outcomes across teams.

attributes.title: Interview Process Audit
attributes.content_brief: Notes on scorecard usage, interviewer calibration, and scheduling bottlenecks from the recent cycle.

attributes.title: Q2 Engagement Snapshot
attributes.content_brief: Employee survey highlights and retention indicators for the quarter.
